theme_caverns.note: biome tileset for the 'caverns' stage (config THEMES.caverns.tileset). Drop-in same format as `tiles`; engine swaps assets.get('tiles') -> assets.get(world.theme.tileset).

bg_caverns.note: biome far-parallax scenery for 'caverns'. render.js drawParallax blits assets.get('bg_caverns') tiled at camx*0.15, ridge base y=158, over the sky gradient; transparent above the silhouette; procedural fallback.

boss_caverns.note: per-stage boss 'Crystal Wing' (caverns). Same chopper silhouette/hitbox as the base; engine swaps via assets.get('boss_caverns') || assets.get('chopper').

decor_caverns_crystal.note: biome set-dressing prop for 'caverns'. Base-anchored: engine sits the prop BOTTOM on the ground y. Place via a level decor:[{x, key:'decor_caverns_crystal', parallax?}] array + a render blit.
